JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: C/C FOR JURY TRIAL, DEFT. EUGENE PILLAND NOT PRESENT, AND HIS JURY DEMAND WAS STRICKEN; CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD AS TO LARRY LITTLEJOHN, CASE PROCEEDED AS A PROVE-UP FOR EUGUNE PILLAND.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE ON COURT'S OWN MOTION IN DEPT. #1

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PILLAND, EUGENE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3016 16TH ST, #109 $1,600.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,600.00, LEASE FORFEITED, (LARRY LITTLEJOHN DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE IN OPEN COURT); PURSUANT TO THIS ACKNOWLEDGEMENT MR. LITTLEJOHN STATED ON THE RECORD THAT HE MAKES NO CLAIM TO ANY RIGHT TO POSSESSION; AND SHERIFF SHALL NOT ACCEPT ANY CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FROM HIM; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS).
